purpose: Full original repo plus safe NexoWatt EOS frontend/login branding and compiled admin runtime assets.
name: NexoWatt EOS full repository package - UI refined v4
v4Changes: Login title changed from Energy Management System wording to NexoWatt EOS / Energy Operation System.
Top bar, drawer and module cards restyled with floating EOS shell.
Direct logout button injected into the top right toolbar.
User/rights helper and permission preset overlay added.
Runtime assets validated to avoid missing asset black screen.
title: NexoWatt EOS UI Performance v5
changes: Hide logout button on login view
Use original NexoWatt logo in login, drawer, topbar, manifest and adapter icons
Use safer backend logout route to prevent 404 redirects
Sanitize login href values pointing to logout/login
changes_v6: Login page never shows injected Abmelden button
Requested old green NexoWatt logo used for login, drawer, topbar, manifest, admin/no-image icons
Login redirect made safer to avoid 404 after successful authentication when no href parameter is present
Login link disabled; Energy Operation System is plain text, not an external link
